com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter

Interface IXHousingScopeSelectionFilter<o extends IXLibraryHousingDefinition>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXEvaluator, IXFilter, IXScopeFilter

    public interface IXHousingScopeSelectionFilter<o extends IXLibraryHousingDefinition>
extends IXScopeFilter
    All custom Scope Plugins needs to implement this interface. Housing Scope filter (IXScopeFilter) implementer will return a set of housing definitions that are applicable in the context provided.

    Sample usage of the implementation class: Assume that there are two housing definition objects being passed and one is applicable in the ocntext provided and one is not applicable.objs will have two housing definitions and will be passed to apply method. after the computation the return objects will have only one housing definition which is applicable. 

                    public class HousingFilter implements IXHousingScopeSelectionFilter<{IXLibraryHousingDefinition}>{
                        public Collection<{IXLibraryHousingDefinition}> apply(Collection<{IXLibraryHousingDefinition}>
 objs,IXComponentSelectionContext sContext )
                        {
                                //Evaluate Scope on all the housing definitions and return the housing definitions which are applicable
                                return Collections.empty_list();
                        }
                };
    See Also:
    IXScopeFilter, IXFilter, IXEvaluation

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Collection<o> apply(java.util.Collection<o> objs, IXComponentSelectionContext sContext) 

    • Method Detail

      • apply

        java.util.Collection<o> apply(java.util.Collection<o> objs,
                              IXComponentSelectionContext sContext)
        Parameters:
        objs - collection of IXLibraryHousingDefinitions to be filtered based on scoping.
        sContext - which will have details of design and project including the scope details.
        Returns:
        Colelction of IXLibraryHousingDefinitions which are applicable in the context provided
